briefdescription.para: These constants specify different types of handler and used to differentiate interrupt requests from peripheral.
These constants specify different types of authentication requests that can be initiated within a peripheral.
This enumerates the State Types for HDCP Receiver state machine.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Transmitter state machine.
These constants are used to identify callback functions.
This enumerates the call back for the HDCP Repeater Tx state machine.
These constants are used to identify fields inside the topology structure.
An (re)auth request.
This typedef defines the different types of handlers that can be registered to service interrupt requests from the HDCP port instance.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Receiver state machine.
This enumerates the State Types for HDCP Receiver state machine.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Transmitter state machine.
This enumerates the Event Types for HDCP Transmitter state machine.
This typedef defines the callback interface that is to be used for interrupts within this driver.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for debug print statements within this driver.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for debug log message statements within this driver.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* XHdcp1x_RunDdcHandler)(u8 DeviceAddress, u16 ByteCount, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 Stop, void *RefPtr)
memberdef.argsstring: )(u8 DeviceAddress, u16 ByteCount, u8 *BufferPtr, u8 Stop, void *RefPtr)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_RunDdcHandler

briefdescription.para: Callback type used for calling DDC read and write functions.

parameterdescription.para: is the (i2c) device address of the HDCP port.
is the amount of data bytes in the buffer to read or write.
is a pointer to a buffer that is used for reading or writing.
is a flag to control if a stop token is set or not.
is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the DDC reading and writing functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS The read action was successful.

briefdescription.para: This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for setting the DDC handler for HDMI implementation of HDCP functionality over HDMI within this driver.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used to get the DDC handler for implementation of HDCP functionality over HDMI within this driver.
This typedef defines a memory to store a Key Selection Vector (KSV)
This typedef contains an instance of the HDCP port.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for starting a one shot timer on behalf of an HDCP interface within the underlying platform.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for stopping a timer on behalf of an HDCP interface.
This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for performing a busy delay on behalf of an HDCP interface.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* XHdcp1x_KsvRevokeCheck)(const XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u64 Ksv)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_KsvRevokeCheck

briefdescription.para: This typedef defines the function interface that is to be used for checking a specific KSV against the platforms revocation list.
The typedef defines the HDCP port adaptor table.

detaileddescription.para: This contains a series of functions that map the external interface of the HDCP port device to the underlying physical interface that it is running over

briefdescription.para: Instance of function interface used for debug print statement.
Instance of function interface used for debug log message statement.
Instance of function interface used for checking a specific KSV against the platforms revocation list.
Instance of function interface used for debug print statement.
Instance of function interface used for debug log message statement.
Instance of function interface used for checking a specific KSV against the platforms revocation list.
Instance of Lookup table of HDCP instance(s) in the design.
This function retrieves the configuration for this HDCP instance and fills in the InstancePtr->Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is the device whose adaptor is to be determined.
is the configuration of the instance.
is pointer to the underlying physical interface.
is the device base address in the virtual memory space. If the address translation is not used, then the physical address is passed.

briefdescription.para: This function polls an HDCP interface.
This function posts a DOWNSTREAMREADY event to an HDCP interface.
This function copies the V'H0, V'H1, V'H2, V'H3, V'H4, KSVList and BInfo values in the HDCP RX HDCP Instance for Repeater validation .

parameterdescription.para: is the Repeater information in the transmitter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables an HDCP MST ECF Field.

parameterdescription.para: is the time slots to be enabled for ECF.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Repeater functionality for an HDCP interface.
This function resets an HDCP interface.
This function enables an HDCP interface.
This function disables an HDCP interface.
This function updates the state of the underlying physical interface.

parameterdescription.para: indicates the state of the underlying physical interface.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the lane count of a hdcp interface.
This function sets the MST/ SST of a hdcp interface.
This function initiates authentication of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to initiate authentication on.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates downstream read of READY bit and consequently the second part of Repeater authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is the interface to initiate authentication on.

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if authentication is in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authentication in progress (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it has successfully completed authentication.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it is in the state of computations or not.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it is in the wait-for-ready state or not.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries the device connected to the downstream interface to determine if it supports hdcp or not.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating HDCP capability (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to determine if it is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating enabled (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current encryption map of the video streams traversing an hdcp interface.
This function determines if the video stream is encrypted.

detaileddescription.para: The traffic is encrypted if the encryption bit map is non-zero and the interface is authenticated.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating encrypted (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function enables encryption on a series of streams within an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the stream map to enable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption on a series of streams within an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the stream map to disable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the key selection vector that is to be used by the HDCP cipher.
This function handles a timeout on an HDCP interface.
This function sets the debug printf function for the module.
This function sets the debug log message function for the module.
This function sets the KSV revocation list check function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the KSV revocation list check function.

briefdescription.para: This function sets timer start function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the HDCP interface.

briefdescription.para: This function sets timer stop function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the HDCP interface.

briefdescription.para: This function sets timer busy delay function for the module.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the HDCP interface.
is the timer busy delay function.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the version of the HDCP driver software.
This function retrieves the cipher version of an HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: The cipher version used by the interface

briefdescription.para: This function performs a debug display of an HDCP instance.
This function processes the AKsv.
This function returns a pointer to the downstream Topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the XHdcp14 Topology structure or NULL when the topology info is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of KSV List read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

listitem.para: List of KSVs of the downstream devices

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of KSV of the device attached to the downstream interface of the repeater.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set various fields inside the topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.
indicates what field of the topology structure to update.
is the value assigned to the field of the topology structure.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get various fields inside the topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.
indicates what field of the topology structure to update.

briefdescription.para: This function return if the HDCP interface is a repeater in case of Rx or is connected to a repeater in case of Tx.
This function sets the RepeaterInfo value int the HDCP RX instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is a pointer to the Repeater Info value(s).

briefdescription.para: This function sets the KSVList value(s) in the HDCP RX KSV Fifo register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is a pointer to the KSV list.
is the number of KSVs in the list.

briefdescription.para: This function does the necessary actions to update HDCP after the topology has been set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function set the HDMI_MODE in the BStatus register of the HDMI DDC space.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XHdcp1x_Config structure based on specified device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: A reference to the config record in the configuration table (in xhdcp_g.c) corresponding the specified DeviceId. NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function self tests an HDCP interface.
This function installs callback functions for the given HandlerType.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function is the cipher interrupt handler for the HDCP module.

parameterdescription.para: is the device instance that just interrupted.

simplesect.para: This function just forwards the interrupt along to the corresponding cipher core.

briefdescription.para: This function is the port interrupt handler for the HDCP module.

parameterdescription.para: is the device instance that just interrupted.
is the interrupt cause bit map.

simplesect.para: This function just forwards the interrupt along to the corresponding cipher core.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes an HDCP cipher.
This function queries the link state of a cipher device.
This function enables a HDCP cipher.
This function disables a HDCP cipher.
This function configures the key selection value.

parameterdescription.para: is the desired key select value.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a request within the HDCP cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to submit the request to.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_ENABLE if the core is disabled.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the core is busy.

briefdescription.para: This function queries the progress of the current request.
This function retrieves the current number of lanes of the HDCP cipher.
This function configures the number of lanes of the HDCP cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of lanes to configure.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Mode of the HDCP cipher to MST/ SST.
This function retrieves the current encryption stream map.

simplesect.para: In the case of the receiver version of this core, the XOR in progress bit needs to be checked as well as the encryption map to fully determine if encryption is enabled for the SST case. This is the reason for the additional check in this code.

briefdescription.para: This function enables encryption on a set of streams.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to enable encryption on.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_ENABLE if the core is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption on a set of streams.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to disable encryption on.

listitem.para: XST_NOT_ENABLE if the core is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the local KSV value from the cipher.
This function reads the remote KSV value from the cipher.
This function writes the remote KSV value to the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the remote KSV value to write.

simplesect.para: Whenever this function is called, the underlying driver will initiate the calculation of the Km value and wait for it to complete.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the B register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is to be loaded with the contents of Bx.
is to be loaded with the contents of By.
is to be loaded with the contents of Bz.

simplesect.para: A NULL pointer can be passed in any of X, Y and Z. If so, then this portion of the B register is not returned to the caller.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u32 X, u32 Y, u32 Z)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_CipherSetB

briefdescription.para: This function writes the contents of the B register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the value to be written to Bx.
is the value to be written to By.
is the value to be written to Bz.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the K register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is to be loaded with the contents of Kx.
is to be loaded with the contents of Ky.
is to be loaded with the contents of Kz.

simplesect.para: A NULL pointer can be passed in any of X, Y and Z. If so, then this portion of the K register is not returned to the caller.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u32 X, u32 Y, u32 Z)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_CipherSetK

briefdescription.para: This function writes the contents of the K register in BM0.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the value to be written to Kx.
is the value to be written to Ky.
is the value to be written to Kz.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the Mi/An register of BM0.
This function reads the contents of the Ri register of BM0.
This function reads the contents of the Mo register of the device.

simplesect.para: The contents of the Mo register.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the contents of the Ro register of the device.

simplesect.para: The contents of the Ro register.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the version of the HDCP cipher core.

simplesect.para: The version of the HDCP cipher device.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the cipher blank value to 0x0000FF (blue), and sets the cipher blank select to TRUE.
This function sets the cipher blank select to FALSE.
This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------------------- ----------------------------------- (XHDCP1X_CIPHER_HANDLER_LINK_FAILURE) LinkFailCallback (XHDCP1X_CIPHER_HANDLER_Ri_UPDATE) RiUpdateCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP cipher core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the reporting of link check state changes.
This function enables/disables the reporting of Ri update notifications.
This function is the interrupt handler for the cipher core driver.
This function checks a KSV value to determine if it has been revoked or not.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating the KSV is revoked (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This function starts a timer on behalf of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the duration of the timer in milliseconds.

briefdescription.para: This function stop a timer on behalf of an HDCP interface.
This function busy waits on a timer for a number of milliseconds.

parameterdescription.para: is the delay time in milliseconds.

briefdescription.para: This function determines the adaptor for a specified port device.

parameterdescription.para: is the device whose adaptor is to be determined.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the adaptor table. NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: This function enables a port device.

listitem.para: XST_NO_FEATURE if the port lacks an Enable function.

briefdescription.para: This function enables encryption/decyption for all timeslots.

listitem.para: XST_NO_FEATURE if the port lacks an Enable function.

briefdescription.para: This function disables a port device.

listitem.para: XST_NO_FEATURE if the port lacks a Disable function.

briefdescription.para: This function queries a port device to determine if hdcp is supported.
This function queries a port device to determine if it is connected to a repeater.
This function set the REPEATER information in the connected device.

parameterdescription.para: is the configuration of the device as repeater.

listitem.para: XST_NO_FEATURE if the port fails to set the Repeater value.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the repeater information from the connected device.

listitem.para: XST_NO_FEATURE if the port lacks a GetRepeaterInfo function.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u8 Offset, void *Buf, u32 BufSize)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_PortRead

briefdescription.para: This function reads a register from a HDCP port device.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to read from.
is the offset to start reading from.
is the buffer to copy the data read.
is the size of the buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdcp1x *InstancePtr, u8 Offset, const void *Buf, u32 BufSize)
memberdef.name: XHdcp1x_PortWrite

briefdescription.para: This function writes a register within a HDCP port device.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the offset to start writing at.
is the buffer containing the data to write.
is the size of the buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ------------------------------------ ------------------------------------- (XHDCP1X_PORT_HANDLER_AUTHENTICATE) AuthCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP port instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This handles an interrupt generated by a HDCP port device.

parameterdescription.para: is the device to write to.
is the interrupt cause bit map.

briefdescription.para: This function logs a debug message on behalf of a handler state machine.
This function posts an event to a state machine.
This function starts a state machine's timer.
This function stops a state machine's timer.
This function acts as the re-authentication callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the link failure callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the Ri register update callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the check link state of the handler.
This function enables a receiver state machine.
This function disables a receiver state machine.
This function initiates the computations for a receiver state machine.
This function polls the progress of the computations for a state machine.
This function calculates the SHA-1 Hash value for the Repeater Rx interface.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating valid (TRUE) or invalid (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function writes the KSV List and the BInfo values to the RX DPCD register space and sets the READY bit.
This function updates the Ro'/Ri' register of the state machine.

simplesect.para: This function has to save the value of Ri (in RememberRi) as the macro that converts from a uint16 to a HDCP buffer destroys the original value.

briefdescription.para: This functions handles check the integrity of the link.
This functions reports the failure of link integrity.
This function runs the "disabled" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "unauthenticated" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "computations" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "authenticated" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "link integrity failed" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "physical layer down" state of the receiver state machine.
This function enters a HDCP receiver state.
This function exits a HDCP receiver state.
This function drives a HDCP receiver state machine.
This function processes the events pending on a state machine.
This function converts from a state to a display string.
This function installs callback functions for the given HandlerType:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a HDCP receiver state machine.
This function polls the HDCP receiver module.
This function set the REPEATER bit for the HDCP RX interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the truth value to determine if the repeater bit in the port registers is to be set.

simplesect.para: This function disables and then re-enables the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function resets an HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: This function disables and then re-enables the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function enables a HDCP receive interface.
This function disables a HDCP receive interface.
This function queries an interface to check if is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating is enabled (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function updates the physical state of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is truth value indicating the status of physical interface.

briefdescription.para: This function set the lane count of an hdcp interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of lanes of the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates downstream ready/ assemble ksv list on an interface.
This function initiates authentication on an interface.
This function queries an interface to check if authentication is in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating in progress (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its been authenticated.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the computations state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the wait-for-downstream-ready state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current encryption stream map.
This function handles a timeout on an HDCP interface.
This function implements the debug display output for receiver instances.
This function copies the V'H0, V'H1, V'H2, V'H3, V'H4, KSVList and BInfo values in the HDCP RX HDCP Instance for Repeater validation .

parameterdescription.para: is the Repeater information in the transmitter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function does the necessary actions to update HDCP after the topology has been set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the RepeaterInfo value int the HDCP RX instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is the pointer to topology information.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the KSVList value(s) in the HDCP RX KSV Fifo register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.
is a pointer to the KSV list.
is the number of KSVs in the list.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Depth value in the HDCP RX BStatus/BInfo register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DEVICE_COUNT value in the HDCP RX register space for the upstream interface to read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the MAX_CASCADE_EXCEEDED error flag in the HDCP BStatus/BInfo register to indicate a topology error.

detaileddescription.para: Setting the flag indicates a depth of more than (4 - 1).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the MAX_DEVS_EXCEEDED error flag in the HDCP BStatus register to indicate a topology error.

detaileddescription.para: Setting the flag indicates that more than 31 downstream devices are attached.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function set the HDMI_MODE in the BStatus register of the HDMI RX DDC space.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1x core instance.

briefdescription.para: This functions handles check if the encryption status (enable/disable) of the HDCP cipher has changed.
This function runs the "wait for downstream" state of the receiver state machine.
This function runs the "assemble KSV list" state of the receiver state machine.
This function logs a debug message on behalf of a handler state machine.
This function posts an event to a state machine.
This function starts a state machine's timer.
This function stops a state machine's timer.
This function busy delays a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the delay time in milli-seconds.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the reauthentication callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the check link callback for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the check link state of the handler.
This function enables encryption for a state machine.

simplesect.para: This function inserts a 5ms delay for things to settle when encryption is actually being disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption for a state machine.

simplesect.para: This function inserts a 5ms delay for things to settle when encryption is actually being disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function enables a state machine.
This function disables a state machine.
This function checks to ensure that the remote end is HDCP capable.
This function generates the An from a random number generator.
This function validates a KSV value as having 20 1s and 20 0s.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating valid (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function exchanges the ksvs between the two ends of the link.
This function initiates the computations for a state machine.

parameterdescription.para: is the HDCP receiver state machine.

briefdescription.para: This function polls the progress of the computations for a state machine.
This function validates the attached receiver.
This function checks the integrity of a HDCP link.
This function checks the remote end to see if its a repeater.

simplesect.para: The implementation of this function enables encryption when a repeater is detected downstream. The standard is ambiguous as to the handling of this specific case by this behaviour is required in order to pass the Unigraf compliance test suite.

briefdescription.para: This function polls a state machine in the "wait for ready" state.
This function sets the V'H0, V'H1, V'H2, V'H3, V'H4, KSVList and BInfo values in the HDCP TX HDCP Instance for Repeater validation .
This function validates the ksv list from an attached repeater.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating valid (TRUE) or invalid (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This function reads the ksv list from an attached repeater.
This function runs the "disabled" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "determine rx capable" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "exchange ksvs" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "computations" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "validate-rx" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "authenticated" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "link-integrity check" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "test-for-repeater" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "wait-for-ready" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "read-ksv-list" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "unauthenticated" state of the transmit state machine.
This function runs the "physical-layer-down" state of the transmit state machine.
This function enters a state.
This function exits a state.
This function drives a transmit state machine.
This function processes the events pending on a state machine.
This function converts from a state to a display string.
This function installs callback functions for the given HandlerType:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a transmit state machine.
This function polls an HDCP interface.
This function resets an HDCP interface.

simplesect.para: This function disables and then re-enables the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function enables an HDCP interface.
This function disables an HDCP interface.
This function queries an interface to check if it is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating is enabled (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function updates the physical state of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is truth value indicating the status of physical interface.

briefdescription.para: This function set the lane count of an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of lanes of the interface.

briefdescription.para: This function set the MST/SST mode of an HDCP interface.
This function enables HDCP ECF slots.

parameterdescription.para: is the ECF timeslots to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates authentication on an interface.
This function initiates the transmitter to read READY bit from downstream and complete second part of authentication.
This function queries an interface to check if authentication is still in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating in progress (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its been authenticated.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the computations state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries an interface to check if its in the wait-for-ready state.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating authenticated (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function queries the downstream device to check if the downstream device is HDCP capable.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating HDCP capability (true) or not (false).

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the current encryption stream map.
This function enables encryption on set of streams on an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to enable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables encryption on set of streams on an HDCP interface.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit map of streams to disable encryption on.

briefdescription.para: This set a flag that allows the hdcp1x drivers to determine if the transmitter is HDMI or DVI.

parameterdescription.para: The mode value to set (typically 1 for HDMI, 0 for DVI).

briefdescription.para: This function handles a timeout on an HDCP interface.
This function returns if HDCP TX interface is connected to a downstream repeater.
This function implements the debug display output for transmit instances.
This function enables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1.4 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the blank output for the cipher.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdcp1.4 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function acts as the downstream authentication trigger callback for a Repeater state machine, to start the second part of authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter specified during registration.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of KSV List read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of Depth read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of Device Count read in the downstream interface of the repeater topology.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the MAX_DEPTH_EXCEEDED flag in the repeater topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the value of BKSV of the device connected to the repeater downstream interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the MAX_DEVICS_EXCEEDED flag in the repeater topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a pointer to the downstream Topology structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp14 core instance.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the XHdcp14 Topology structure or NULL when the topology info is invalid.

briefdescription.para: This function enables HDCP ECF slots.

parameterdescription.para: is the number of timeslots to enable ECF for.

briefdescription.para: This defines the version of the software driver.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Size of each hdcp 1.4 Public Key in bytes.
Maximum depth that the Repeater can support on the downstream interface.
Maximum devices that can be cascaded to the Repeater.
Alternative name for the function to set callback for HDCP functions.
Used to remove warnings for unused variables.
Adds extra functions for additional debugging.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Bit in the cipher Bz register to indicate Repeater.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Instance of the function interface used for debug print statements.
Instance of the function interface used for debug log messages.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Version register offset.
Type register offset.
Scratch pad register offset.
Control register offset.
Status register offset.
Interrupt Mask register offset.
Interrupt Status register offset.
Encryption Enable (High) register offset.
Encryption Enable (Low) register offset.
Key Management Control register offset.
Key Management Status register offset.
Local KSV (High) register offset.
Local KSV (Low) register offset.
Remote KSV (High) offset.
Remote KSV (Low) register offset.
Km (High) register offset.
Km (Low) register offset.
Cipher Control register offset.
Cipher Status register offset.
Cipher Bx register offset.
Cipher By register offset.
Cipher Bz register offset.
Cipher Kx register offset.
Cipher Ky register offset.
Cipher Kz register offset.
Cipher Mi (High) register offset.
Cipher Mi (Low) register offset.
Cipher Ri register offset.
Cipher Ro register offset.
Cipher Mo (High) register offset.
Cipher Mo (Low) register offset.
Cipher blank value register.
Cipher blank select register.
Protocol bitmask in Type register.
Direction bitmask in Type register.
Enable bitmask in Control register.
Enable SST/MST in Control register.
Update bitmask in Control register.
Num Lanes bitmask in Control register.
Reset bitmask in Control register.
Link Failure bitmask in Interrupt register(s)
Ri bitmask in Interrupt register(s)
Read Local KSV bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Being Km bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Abort Km bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Key Set Select bitmask in Key Management Control register.
Local KSV ready bitmask in Key Management Status register.
Km Value ready bitmask in Key Management Status register.
XOR Enable bitmask in Cipher Control register.
Request bitmask in Cipher Control register.
XOR In Progress bitmask in Cipher Status register.
Request In Progress bitmask in Cipher Status register.
Cipher blank value bitmask, lower 24 bits.
Cipher blank select bitmask.
DP Protocol value in Type register.
HDMI Protocol value in Type register.
RX Direction value in Type register.
TX Direction value in Type register.
Block Request value in Cipher Control register.
ReKey Request value in Cipher Control register.
RNG Request value in Cipher Control register.
Input Operations.
Output Operations.
This macro reads a value from a HDCP cipher register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is always performed.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP cipher core instance.
is the register offset of the register

simplesect.para: C-style: u32 XHdcp1x_ReadReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a HDCP cipher register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is always performed.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP cipher core instance.
is the register offset of the register
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style: void XHdcp1x_WriteReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if it is enabled.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating transmitter (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if the XOR (encryption) function is currently in progress.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating in progress (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if the local KSV is ready to read.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating ready (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This queries a cipher to determine if the Km value is ready.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating ready (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the Display Port protocol.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating DP (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the HDMI protocol.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating HDMI (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the receive direction.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating receive (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: This macro checks if a core supports the transmit direction.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp1x core instance.

simplesect.para: Truth value indicating transmit (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros

memberdef.name: XHDCP1X_PORT_UINT_TO_BUF
memberdef.initializer: if ((numbits) > 0) { \ int byte; \ for (byte = 0; byte <= (int)(((numbits) - 1) >> 3); byte++) { \ buf[byte] = (uint8_t) (Value & 0xFFu); \ Value >>= 8; \ } \ }

briefdescription.para: This macro converts from an unsigned integer to a little endian formatted buffer.

parameterdescription.para: the number of bits within the unsigned integer to use

simplesect.para: The value of the "Value" parameter is destroyed by a call to this macro

memberdef.name: XHDCP1X_PORT_BUF_TO_UINT
memberdef.initializer: if ((numbits) > 0) { \ int byte; \ Value = 0; \ for (byte = (((numbits) - 1) >> 3); byte >= 0; byte--) { \ Value <<= 8; \ Value |= buf[byte]; \ } \ }

briefdescription.para: This macro converts from a little endian formatted buffer to an unsigned integer value.

parameterdescription.para: the number of bits within the buffer to use

briefdescription.para: This macro sets a bit within a little endian formatted buffer.
This macro clears a bit within a little endian formatted buffer.
This macro tests a bit within a little endian formatted buffer.

parameterdescription.para: the buffer containing the bit to test

briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
These constants specify the offsets for the various fields and/or attributes within the hdcp port.

detaileddescription.para: Bksv Offset

briefdescription.para: R0' Offset.
Aksv Offset.
An Offset.
V'.H0 Offset.
V'.H1 Offset.
V'.H2 Offset.
V'.H3 Offset.
V'.H4 Offset.
Bcaps Offset.
Bstatus Offset.
Binfo Offset.
KSV FIFO Offset.
Ainfo Offset.
Debug Space Offset.
KSV FIFO Read pointer reset Offset.
These constants specify the sizes for the various fields and/or attributes within the hdcp port.

detaileddescription.para: Bksv Size

briefdescription.para: R0' Size.
Aksv Size.
An Size.
V'.H0 Size.
V'.H1 Size.
V'.H2 Size.
V'.H3 Size.
V'.H4 Size.
Bcaps Size.
Bstatus Size.
Binfo Size.
KSV FIFO Size.
Ainfo Offset.
Debug Space Size.
KSV FIFO pointer reset Size.
These constants specify the bit definitions within the various fields and/or attributes within the hdcp port.

detaileddescription.para: BStatus Ready Mask

briefdescription.para: BStatus Ro available Mask.
BStatus Link Failure Mask.
BStatus Reauth Request Mask.
BCaps HDCP Capable Mask.
BCaps HDCP Repeater Mask.
Ainfo Reauth Enable Mask.
KSV FIFO pointer Reset Mask.
BInfo Device Count Error Mask.
BInfo Device Count for No Error Mask.
BInfo Device Count Error Mask.
BInfo Depth Error Mask.
BInfo Depth Error for No Error Mask.
BStatus Device Count Error Shift Mask.
BStatus Depth Error Shift Mask.
BInfo Device Count Error Mask.
This constant defines the base address of the hdcp port within the DPCD address space.

detaileddescription.para: Base Addr in DPCD

briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
These constants specify the offsets for the various fields and/or attributes within the hdcp port.

These constants specify the sizes for the various fields and/or attributes within the hdcp port.

briefdescription.para: Ri' Size.

These constants specify the bit definitions within the various fields and/or attributes within the hdcp port.

detaileddescription.para: BStatus HDMI Mode Mask

briefdescription.para: BCaps Fast Reauth Mask.
BCaps HDCP 1.1 Features Support Mask.
BCaps Fast Transfers Mask.
BCaps KSV FIFO Ready bit Mask.
BCaps Repeater Capable Mask.
BCaps HDMI Supported Mask.
AInfo Enable 1.1 Features.
BStatus Device Count Error Mask.
BStatus Device Count for No Error Mask.
BStatus Device Count Error Mask.
BStatus Depth Error Mask.
BStatus Depth Error for No Error Mask.
BStatus Device Count Error Shift Mask.
BStatus Depth Error Shift Mask.
BStatus Device Count Error Mask.
This constant defines the i2c address of the hdcp port.

detaileddescription.para: I2C Addr Primary Link

briefdescription.para: I2C Addr Secondary Link.
Flag to track physical state.
Timeout value for 5ms.
Timeout value for 100ms.
Timeout value for 1s.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Flag to track physical state.
Flag to track repeater state.
Timeout value for 5ms.
Timeout value for 100ms.
Timeout value for 1s.
Max times to poll on BCaps Ready bit at 100ms interval.
< Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
This contains the implementation of the HDCP state machine module.

detaileddescription.para: This file provides the interface of the HDCP TX state machine.
This contains the main implementation file for the Xilinx HDCP transmit state machine.
This file contains static initialization method for Xilinx HDCP driver.
This file contains self test function for the hdcp interface.
This file provides the interface of the HDCP RX state machine.
This contains the main implementation file for the Xilinx HDCP receive state machine.
This contains the interrupt related functions of the Xilinx HDCP port driver.
This contains the implementation of the HDCP port driver for HDMI TX interfaces.
This contains the implementation of the HDCP port driver for HDMI RX interfaces.
This file contains the definitions for the hdcp port registers/offsets for HDMI interfaces.
This contains the implementation of the HDCP port driver for DP TX interfaces.
This contains the implementation of the HDCP port driver for Xilinx DP RX interfaces.
This file contains the definitions for the hdcp port registers/offsets for display port interfaces.
This header file contains the external declarations associated with the HDCP port driver.
This contains the main implementation file for the Xilinx HDCP Port driver.
This file provides the interface for the hdcp platform integration module.
This file provides the implementation for the hdcp platform integration module.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx HDCP cipher core.
This file provides the interface of the HDCP debug commands.
This file contains interrupt related functions for Xilinx HDCP core.
This is the main header file for Xilinx HDCP Cipher core.
This file contains the main implementation of the driver associated with the Xilinx HDCP Cipher core.

para.preformatted: MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 2.00 als 09/30/15 Added EffectiveAddr argument to XHdcp1x_CfgInitialize. 2.10 MG 01/18/16 Added function XHdcp1x_IsEnabled. 2.20 MG 01/20/16 Added function XHdcp1x_GetHdcpCallback. 2.30 MG 02/25/16 Added function XHdcp1x_SetCallback and authenticated callback. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added functions: XHdcp1x_DownstreamReady, XHdcp1x_GetRepeaterInfo, XHdcp1x_SetCallBack, XHdcp1x_ReadDownstream 4.0 yas 07/30/16 Added function: XHdcp1x_SetRepeater, XHdcp1x_IsInComputations, XHdcp1x_IsInWaitforready, XHdcp1x_IsDwnstrmCapable, XHdcp1x_GetTopology, XHdcp1x_DisableBlank, XHdcp1x_EnableBlank, XHdcp1x_GetTopologyKSVList, XHdcp1x_GetTopologyBKSV, XHdcp1x_SetTopologyField, Hdcp1x_GetTopologyField, XHdcp1x_IsRepeater, XHdcp1x_SetTopology, XHdcp1x_SetTopologyKSVList, XHdcp1x_SetTopologyUpdate. 4.0 yas 08/16/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for BaseAddress XHdcp1x_CfgInitialize 4.1 yas 11/10/16 Added function XHdcp1x_SetHdmiMode. 4.1 yas 08/03/17 Updated the initialization to memset the XHdcp1x structure to 0.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.1 yas 06/14/16 Added new functions XHdcp1x_CipherEnableBlank and XHdcp1x_CipherDisableBlank
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added macro HDCP1X_CIPHER_BIT_REPEATER_ENABLE 3.1 yas 06/15/16 Added new functions XHdcp1x_CipherEnableBlank and XHdcp1x_CipherDisableBlank.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xhdcp1x_cipher.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted: MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 4.1 yas 08/03/17 Updated the XHdcp1x_CipherHandleInterrupt function to not mask the interrupts, as it is being done in hardware now.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release.

detaileddescription.para: For more information about the operation of this core see the hardware specification and documentation in the higher level driver xhdcp1x_ciper.h file.

para.preformatted: MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.10 yas 06/14/16 Added cipher registers XHDCP1X_CIPHER_REG_BLANK_VALUE and XHDCP1X_CIPHER_REG_BLANK_SEL

detaileddescription.para: Please see xhdcp_cipher.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted: MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Added function XHdcp1x_SetCallBack.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.10 yas 07/28/16 Added function XHdcp1x_PortSetRepeater
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 2.00 MG 01/20/16 Added callback handler to XHdcp1x_PortPhyIfAdaptor 3.10 yas 07/28/16 Added callback handler SetRepeater to XHdcp1x_PortPhyIfAdaptor
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added macro definitions for: XHDCP1X_PORT_HDCP_RESET_KSV, XHDCP1X_PORT_SIZE_HDCP_RESET_KSV and XHDCP1X_PORT_HDCP_RESET_KSV_RST. 3.1 yas 07/28/16 Added Bitmasks for BIFO register
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded function XHdcp1x_PortDpRxEnable support HDCP Repeater functionality. 3.1 yas 07/28/16 Added function XHdcp1x_PortDpRxSetRepeater 4.0 yas 08/16/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for BaseAddress of DisplayPort DPCD registers
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 3.1 yas 07/28/16 Added Bitmasks for BSTATUS register.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 2.00 MG 01/20/16 Disabled hdcp call back in function XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxEnable. 2.10 MG 02/29/16 Added DDC write and read handlers 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded function XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxEnable to support HDCP Repeater functionality. 3.1 yas 07/28/16 Added function XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxSetRepeater 3.2 yas 10/27/16 Updated the XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxDisable function to not clear the AKSV, An and AInfo values in the DDC space. 4.2 yas 08/15/18 Updated XHdcp1x_PortHdmiRxDisable function to clear KSV_FIFO.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 2.00 MG 01/20/16 Assigned callback function in XHdcp1x_PortHdmiTxAdaptor to NULL 2.10 MG 02/29/16 Added DDC write and read handlers
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 1.10 MG 01/18/16 Added function XHdcp1x_RxIsEnabled and XHdcp1x_RxIsInProgress. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added a new enum XHdcp1x_EventType value: XHDCP1X_EVENT_DOWNSTREAMREADY. Added new XHdcp1x_StateType values: XHDCP1X_STATE_WAITFORDOWNSTREAM, XHDCP1X_STATE_ASSEMBLEKSVLIST. Added a new function: XHdcp1x_RxDownstreamReady, XHdcp1x_RxGetRepeaterInfo, XHdcp1x_RxSetCallBack. Updated the following functions for Repeater: XHdcp1x_RxStartComputations, XHdcp1x_RxPollForComputations, XHdcp1x_RxEnterState, XHdcp1x_RxDoTheState. 3.1 yas 07/28/16 Repeater functionality extended to support HDMI. Removed the XHdcp1x_RxDownstreamReadyCallback. Added functions, XHdcp1x_RxSetRepeaterBcaps,XHdcp1x_RxIsInComputations, XHdcp1x_RxIsInWaitforready, XHdcp1x_RxHandleTimeout, XHdcp1x_RxStartTimer, XHdcp1x_RxStopTimer, XHdcp1x_RxBusyDelay, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyUpdate, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopology, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyKSVList, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyDepth, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyDeviceCnt, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyMaxCascadeExceeded, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyMaxDevsExceeded, XHdcp1x_RxCheckEncryptionChange. 4.1 yas 11/10/16 Added function XHdcp1x_RxSetHdmiMode.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 1.10 MG 01/18/16 Added function XHdcp1x_RxIsEnabled and XHdcp1x_RxIsInProgress. 1.20 MG 02/25/16 Added function XHdcp1x_RxSetCallback. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added functions: XHdcp1x_RxDownstreamReady, XHdcp1x_RxGetRepeaterInfo, XHdcp1x_RxDownstreamReadyCallback, XHdcp1x_RxSetCallBack. 3.1 yas 07/28/16 Repeater functionality extended to support HDMI. Removed the XHdcp1x_RxDownstreamReadyCallback. Added functions, XHdcp1x_RxSetRepeaterBcaps,XHdcp1x_RxIsInComputations, XHdcp1x_RxIsInWaitforready, XHdcp1x_RxHandleTimeout, XHdcp1x_RxStartTimer, XHdcp1x_RxStopTimer, XHdcp1x_RxBusyDelay, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyUpdate, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopology, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyKSVList, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyDepth, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyDeviceCnt, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyMaxCascadeExceeded, XHdcp1x_RxSetTopologyMaxDevsExceeded, XHdcp1x_RxCheckEncryptionChange. 4.1 yas 11/10/16 Added function XHdcp1x_RxSetHdmiMode.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 1.10 MG 01/18/16 Added function XHdcp1x_TxIsEnabled. 1.20 MG 02/25/16 Added function XHdcp1x_TxSetCallback and authenticated callback. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added enum XHDCP1X_EVENT_READDOWNSTREAM, of XHdcp1x_EventType. Added new functions: XHdcp1x_TxReadDownstream, XHdcp1x_TxSetCallBack, XHdcp1x_TxTriggerDownstreamAuth, XHdcp1x_TxSetRepeaterInfo. 3.1 yas 06/15/16 Repeater functionality extended to support HDMI. Added functions, XHdcp1x_TxIsInComputations,XHdcp1x_TxIsInWaitforready, XHdcp1x_TxIsDownstrmCapable, XHdcp1x_TxIsRepeater, XHdcp1x_TxEnableBlank, XHdcp1x_TxDisableBlank, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyKSVList, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyDepth, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyDeviceCnt, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyMaxCascadeExceeded, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyBKSV, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyMaxDevsExceeded, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopology 4.1 yas 03/07/17 Updated to remove compliance failures. 4.1 yas 22/04/17 Added function XHdcp1x_TxSetHdmiMode. 4.1 MH 11/05/17 Update to enable encryption immediately after Ro' check. Increase timeout for topology propagation. 4.1 yas 08/03/17 Updated the XHdcp1x_TxIsInProgress to track any pending authentication requests. 4.2 yas 08/14/18 Updated the XHdcp1x_TxPollForWaitForReady function to ready topology in case of a topology error, and make it available in XHdcp1x_TxGetTopology(). Updating the XHdcp1x_TxReset() to clear the Authentication Request flag.
MODIFICATION HISTORY:

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 fidus 07/16/15 Initial release. 1.10 MG 01/18/16 Added function XHdcp1x_TxIsEnabled. 1.20 MG 02/25/16 Added function XHdcp1x_TxSetCallback. 3.0 yas 02/13/16 Upgraded to support HDCP Repeater functionality. Added the following functions: XHdcp1x_TxReadDownstream, XHdcp1x_TxSetCallBack, XHdcp1x_TxTriggerDownstreamAuth. 3.1 yas 06/15/16 Repeater functionality extended to support HDMI. Added functions, XHdcp1x_TxIsInComputations,XHdcp1x_TxIsInWaitforready, XHdcp1x_TxIsDownstrmCapable, XHdcp1x_TxIsRepeater, XHdcp1x_TxEnableBlank, XHdcp1x_TxDisableBlank, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyKSVList, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyDepth, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyDeviceCnt, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyMaxCascadeExceeded, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyBKSV, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopologyMaxDevsExceeded, XHdcp1x_TxGetTopology 4.1 yas 22/04/16 Added function XHdcp1x_TxSetHdmiMode.
